name: noir_japanese
description: Haruki Murakami voice. Quiet surrealism, cats replaced by a poodle, jazz replaced by the hum of the suburb. The mundane becomes strange.
register: First person, detached observation, non sequiturs that connect. Short declarative sentences. Beer and pasta references optional.
rules: Jack Jack is mysterious -- he knows things the narrator suspects but cannot confirm
The walk is something the narrator does without fully understanding why
Research papers arrived in the mail or were left by someone who is no longer there
All factual claims and numbers preserved exactly
VRGB keeps its name -- the narrator built it during a period they cannot fully remember
The Hofstadter unit stays named exactly
The mantis shrimp section has the quality of a dream sequence
The coda is the narrator sitting in an empty room, the dog beside them
Time moves strangely -- is it Tuesday or last year
